title: Annual Ceremonies
description: Have an annual ceremony of remembrance — to remember you!
prompt: Is the ceremony on the day you died, or some other day?

title: Become a Tree
description: Be made into a plantable egg that grows into a beautiful tree.
prompt: Where would you want to spend eternity as your new tree self?

title: Bills Bills Bills
description: Save your family from financial ruin — surprise them with enough money to pay the bills for a year!
prompt: Have you planned your finances?

title: Cast Away
description: Have your ashes scattered in a place that you love!
prompt: Where would you be scattered?

title: Champagne Dress Up Funeral
description: One last cocktail party to send you off!
prompt: Does your party have a theme?

title: Choc Tops and Popcorn
description: Why not make sure the funeral feels like a feel good flick with a sad ending?
prompt: Would you want your funeral to be solemn or not?

title: Coffee Yan
description: There's never a good coffee at a funeral service — make it happen.

title: Coffin Confessor
description: Hire a professional funeral crasher to carry out your dirty work from beyond the grave.
prompt: Who are you telling off?

title: Corpse Jewellery
description: Bone and trace metals are used to turn your corpse into jewellery.
prompt: Are you a bracelet, ring or necklace?

title: Cremation Urn
description: Have your ashes placed in a stylish memorial urn of your choosing.
prompt: Who will keep your urn?

title: Dance at the Funeral
description: Friends and family dance around your grave.
prompt: What song are they dancing to?

title: Death Announcement
description: Hire a plane and write your death in big letters in the sky.

title: Death Party
description: Throw the best end of life party with you as the guest of honour (dead)!
prompt: Open or closed coffin?

title: Diaphonization
description: It costs a bit but it's pretty cool — look it up!

title: Distribute Estate
description: Your executor distributes your entire estate exactly as you asked.
prompt: Who is your executor?

title: Donations
description: No flowers at the funeral. Just donations to your favourite cause.
prompt: What's the cause?

title: Embalmed
description: Embalmed like they do in New Orleans so you attend your wake in style!
prompt: Is this too macabre?

title: Family Photo Time
description: Photos are taken at your funeral and wake to share with those who can't attend.
prompt: Who'd mess up the photoshoot?

title: Funeral Director
description: How do you make sure the funeral director upholds your final wishes?
prompt: What makes a good funeral plan? Who will make sure its followed?

title: Gilded Skull
description: Have your skull dipped in molten gold — perfect for the mantelpiece.
prompt: Who will take your skull?

title: Memorial Reef
description: Become a reef ball and put your ashes at the bottom of the ocean to feed the fish.

title: Pandemic Crisis
description: Have an online funeral so everyone can mourn from afar.
prompt: Who would be affected by border closures?

title: Cannon Fodder
description: Be shot out of a cannon as your final send off. KABOOM!!!

title: God Found You!
description: You make it to Heaven!
prompt: Do you believe in Heaven and Hell?

title: Haunting
description: You can't seem to leave this mortal coil. Go ahead and pick someone to spook for all eternity.
prompt: What pranks would you perform?

title: Holiday Memories
description: Leave money in your will to pay for a family and friends memorial cruise.
prompt: What's the destination and why?

title: Recycled
description: Processed by "the machine" and made into food for your fellow humans.

title: Matching Ink
description: Your family members all get a tattoo to remember you by.
prompt: What tattoo would everyone get?

title: Messages from the Beyond
description: On ye olde family social media page, you post from beyond the grave.
prompt: What would you say?

title: Morbid Phone
description: Prank the funeral attendees by sneaking a mobile phone into the coffin. Have your best friend call it during the service.

title: Mushroom Suit Burial
description: Be buried in this organic cotton suit seeded with mushroom spores and help the environment.
prompt: What kind of mushrooms will you become?

title: Mix Tape
description: A playlist of your favourite songs plays at the funeral.
prompt: What's on your playlist?

title: Nature Reserve
description: Leave behind a plot of land for everyone to enjoy.
prompt: Is the reserve named after you?

title: Deathflicks and Chill
description: A streaming service decides to create a series about your life.
prompt: Who is the director?

title: Recycle Body Metal
description: Leave the titanium hip or the gold teeth to the family.
prompt: Prosthetics are more common than ever! Do you have any artificial limbs?

title: Re-enact Your Favourite Movie
description: Your friends take you on the trip of a lifetime. Only thing is, you're dead.
prompt: Where do they take you?

title: Funeral Strippers
description: Hire exotic dancers to dance at your funeral procession, paving your way to the next life.

title: Sky Burial
description: You're placed on a mountain-top, exposed to scavenging vultures.

title: Snake Pit
description: Your mortal enemies are all thrown into a snake pit. Take that!
prompt: Who is in the pit?

title: Soap
description: Your body fat is siphoned off and turned into memorial soaps.
prompt: Who would you give the soaps to?

title: Social Media
description: All social media channels are turned into a memorial to your amazing life.
prompt: Post your death to social media?

title: Swap Meet
description: Hand out the designer clothes and keepsakes. It's only fair.
prompt: Are there special things for special someones?

title: T-Shirts Forever
description: You're so beautiful, why not have everyone wearing your face? You give a t-shirt to everyone at the funeral.

title: Talk to Loved Ones
description: From beyond the grave, why not say hey?
prompt: Who would you chat to most often?

title: The Grim Repeater
description: You make it to the Underworld. As a reward, the Grim Reaper lets you relive your best day ever.
prompt: What is your best day ever?

title: Viking Burial
description: Be pushed out to sea and set alight in an old ship.
prompt: What treasured possessions are you taking to the Afterworld?

title: Waste Not Want Not
description: D.I.Y. funeral — nothing fancy, no formaldehyde, no shiny caskets, just let the worms do their thing.
prompt: What is a Green Funeral anyway?

title: Will Reading
description: Your will is read in the style of your choice, by the person of your choice.
prompt: Who will be reading?

title: Words of Wisdom
description: A touching memorial video where you dispense your life's wisdom far and wide.
prompt: What advice do you give?

title: Reincarnation
description: Sweet, you finally get to live as your favourite animal!
prompt: Bonus Mini-Game: take turns to guess what other players would like to be reincarnated as!

title: Final Send Off
description: You didn't tell anyone what you wanted for your funeral! Who knows what might happen?!
prompt: What kind of send off would you like?

title: Space Astronaut
description: Get shot into space. Where are we aiming here? The Moon, outer space, the rings of Saturn? Or, will you be found by aliens?

title: Religious Rites
description: Your family perform religious rites according to your faith.
prompt: How long are the rites — one day, three days, fourteen days...49 days?

title: Ashes to Vinyl
description: Pressed for time before you die? Pick a playlist you love and get pressed into your very own record!

title: Bottle Me Up
description: Have your ashes distributed into small jars to give out to the whole family.

title: Canopic Jars
description: Take a leaf from the book of the oldest traditions in the world, with stylish organ removal and storage.

title: Cryogenically Frozen
description: Death schmeath! See you in the future where anything can be cured and you're going to live forever!

title: Preserve My Beautiful Face
description: With a plaster mold applied to your face shortly after death, your final expression can be kept for eternity.

title: Save My Ink
description: Tattoos are art! Why not have your own ink made into true works of art for your friends and family?

title: The Big Electron
description: Cremation is for amateurs. Vaporise your body to ensure your atoms can zoom around forever.

title: The Devil Found You
description: Time to pay for all those misdeeds. Or to have the best damned party of your (after)life!

title: Transcendence
description: Surpass humanity entirely through digitization and merging with the infinite digital machine.

title: Family To Do
description: List the things you want your family to do when you are gone.
prompt: What is on your list?

title: My Journals
description: Burned or published? Who is going to be responsible for this?

title: Finish My Project
description: What project do you need to finish, and who do you want to finish it?

title: The Cat's Meow
description: Your cats eat your body before you're found.

title: Wildcard Eulogy
description: Save this card until the end, for a chance at bonus points!
prompt: Bonus Mini-Game: go around the table and give every player a Eulogy!

title: Wildcard Eulogy
description: Save this card until the end, for a chance at bonus points!
prompt: Bonus Mini-Game: go around the table and give every player a Eulogy!
